ecarx.carext.display.nightmode

Interface INightMode

  • All Superinterfaces:
    BaseAPI

    public interface INightMode
extends BaseAPI
    This class provides the API for accessing night mode functionality.
    Since:
    5

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static interface  INightMode.NightMode
      NightMode

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface ecarx.carext.base.BaseAPI

        BaseAPI.Callback

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int MODE_NIGHT_CUSTOM
      Constant for setNightMode(int) and getNightMode(): automatically switch night mode on and off based on the time.
      static int MODE_NIGHT_INVALID
      Constant for setNightMode(int) and getNightMode(): night mode value invalid.
      static int MODE_NIGHT_NO
      Constant for setNightMode(int) and getNightMode(): never run in night mode.
      static int MODE_NIGHT_SUNLIGHT_SENSOR
      Constant for setNightMode(int) and getNightMode(): automatically switch night mode on and off based on sunlight sensor.
      static int MODE_NIGHT_SUNRISE_AND_SUNSET
      Constant for setNightMode(int) and getNightMode(): automatically switch night mode on and off based on the sunlight time.
      static int MODE_NIGHT_YES
      Constant for setNightMode(int) and getNightMode(): always run in night mode.

      Sets the time of the day Dark theme activates

      Sets the system-wide night mode.

        Since:

      • MODE_NIGHT_SUNLIGHT_SENSOR

        static final int MODE_NIGHT_SUNLIGHT_SENSOR
        Constant for setNightMode(int) and getNightMode(): automatically switch night mode on and off based on sunlight sensor.
        Since:
        5

    • Method Detail

      • setNightMode

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_NIGHT_MODE")
default boolean setNightMode(int mode)
        Sets the system-wide night mode.

        The mode can be one of:

        • MODE_NIGHT_NO sets the device into notnight mode
        • MODE_NIGHT_YES sets the device into night mode
        • MODE_NIGHT_CUSTOM automatically switches between night and notnight based on the custom time set (or default)
        • MODE_NIGHT_SUNRISE_AND_SUNSET automatically switches between night and notnight based on the device's current location and sunlight time
        • MODE_NIGHT_SUNLIGHT_SENSOR automatically switches between night and notnight based on sunlight sensor
        Parameters:
        mode - the night mode to set
        Since:
        5
        See Also:
        getNightMode()

      • getNightMode

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_NIGHT_MODE")
default int getNightMode()
        Returns the currently configured night mode.

        May be one of:

        • MODE_NIGHT_NO
        • MODE_NIGHT_YES
        • MODE_NIGHT_SUNLIGHT_SENSOR
        • MODE_NIGHT_CUSTOM
        • MODE_NIGHT_SUNRISE_AND_SUNSET
        • MODE_NIGHT_INVALID on error
        Returns:
        the current night mode, or MODE_NIGHT_INVALID on error
        Since:
        5
        See Also:
        setNightMode(int)

      • getCustomNightModeStart

        @NonNull
 @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_NIGHT_MODE")
default java.time.LocalTime getCustomNightModeStart()
        Returns the time of the day Dark theme activates

        When night mode is MODE_NIGHT_CUSTOM, the system uses this time set to activate it automatically.

        Since:
        5

      • setCustomNightModeStart

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_NIGHT_MODE")
default boolean setCustomNightModeStart(@NonNull
                                                                                                                java.time.LocalTime time)
        Sets the time of the day Dark theme activates

        When night mode is MODE_NIGHT_CUSTOM, the system uses this time set to activate it automatically

        Parameters:
        time - The time of the day Dark theme should activate
        Since:
        5

      • getCustomNightModeEnd

        @NonNull
 @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_NIGHT_MODE")
default java.time.LocalTime getCustomNightModeEnd()
        Returns the time of the day Dark theme deactivates

        When night mode is MODE_NIGHT_CUSTOM, the system uses this time set to deactivate it automatically.

        Since:
        5

      • setCustomNightModeEnd

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_NIGHT_MODE")
default boolean setCustomNightModeEnd(@NonNull
                                                                                                              java.time.LocalTime time)
        Sets the time of the day Dark theme deactivates

        When night mode is MODE_NIGHT_CUSTOM, the system uses this time set to deactivate it automatically.

        Parameters:
        time - The time of the day Dark theme should deactivate
        Since:
        5

      • registerNightModeListener

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_NIGHT_MODE")
default boolean registerNightModeListener(NightModeListener listener)
        Register an observer to obtain night mode event.
        Since:
        5

      • unregisterNightModeListener

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_NIGHT_MODE")
default void unregisterNightModeListener(NightModeListener listener)
        Unregister the observer.
        Since:
        5
